hero.name: Luiz Hondo
hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.tagline: Turning real problems into solutions|that deliver true value.

about.heading: About me
about.bio: I'm a front-end developer with a degree in Systems Analysis, focused on turning real challenges into clear, efficient, and sustainable digital solutions. Throughout my career, I've learned that technology only creates value when it solves concrete problems and facilitates decisions. That's why I work with discipline, organization, and critical thinking, always seeking to understand the context before proposing any solution. I use tools like React, React Native, and TypeScript strategically — not just to build modern interfaces, but to structure scalable, well-planned, and long-term reliable applications. I believe trust is built through consistency, attention to detail, and commitment to deliveries that truly work. My goal is to develop solutions that make sense today and remain solid tomorrow.
highlights: turning real challenges into clear, efficient, and sustainable digital solutions
solves concrete problems and facilitates decisions
attention to detail and commitment to deliveries

items.title: Mobile Shopping List
items.summary: A simple shopping list app built with React Native and Expo.

caseStudy.title: Mobile Shopping List
caseStudy.summary: A mobile shopping list with local persistence and status filters.
caseStudy.problem: Many people need a quick and lightweight way to manage shopping lists on their phone.
caseStudy.solution: I built an app with pending/completed item filters and local storage using AsyncStorage.
caseStudy.process: I designed the interface with a focus on simple UX, using Expo and TypeScript to develop screens, logic, and persistence.

items.title: Digital Library Website
items.summary: A web interface inspired by a library catalog, focusing on layout and organization.

caseStudy.title: Digital Library — Website
caseStudy.summary: A library-inspired website with well-structured sections and easy navigation.
caseStudy.problem: Create an organized and coherent interface for a library page.
caseStudy.solution: I structured a clean layout with HTML and CSS and organized each section for comfortable reading.
caseStudy.process: I built the structure, applied modern styles, and added small scripts to improve the browsing experience.

items.title: Full API with Authentication + React Frontend
items.summary: Full-stack project with a Node.js/Express API and React frontend.

caseStudy.title: Full API with Authentication + React Frontend
caseStudy.summary: A complete application demonstrating authentication, protected routes, and full frontend integration.
caseStudy.problem: There was a lack of projects that truly integrated backend and frontend with users, authentication, and full CRUDs.
caseStudy.solution: I implemented a REST API with JWT and integrated it with a React SPA using React Router and API calls.
caseStudy.process: I modeled the API with Express + Mongoose, developed protected routes, and then built the React frontend with simple state management.

items.title: Homeland Landing Page
items.summary: A front-end project focused on layout, responsiveness, and modern aesthetics.

caseStudy.title: Homeland Landing Page
caseStudy.summary: A web page developed for responsive layout practice and clean design.
caseStudy.problem: Create a visually modern, accessible, and responsive landing page.
caseStudy.solution: I used semantic HTML, modern CSS, and layout practices with flexbox and grid.
caseStudy.process: I structured the content, created the visual hierarchy, and tested layout variations across different devices.

items.title: CoffeeShop Website
items.summary: A coffee shop themed website focused on pleasant UI and visual organization.

caseStudy.title: CoffeeShop Website
caseStudy.summary: A themed page created to practice visual structuring and user experience.
caseStudy.problem: Practice themed layouts and user-friendly interfaces using HTML and CSS.
caseStudy.solution: I developed a website with well-defined sections, coffee shop-inspired styling, and consistent visuals.
caseStudy.process: I planned the layout, styled it with CSS, and added light interactivity using JavaScript.

contact.heading: Let's talk?
contact.description: Help me help you! Do you have a problem or task and need to find a solution? An application? A system? A website that's uniquely yours? Send me a message with no strings attached and let's work on it together.

videoConverter.pagePrivacy: All processing happens in your browser — your videos never leave your device.
